events.cardDescription: An inspirational afternoon with Dr. Katie Takayasu on how daily habits shape hormonal balance, mood, and long-term vitality.
events.title: Mini Retreat: Women's Health Through Habits
events.description:
Join **Dr. Katie Takayasu** for an inspirational afternoon helping women understand how their daily choices, habits and routines influence hormonal balance, mood, and long-term vitality.

With her background in Western medicine and evidence-based contemporary practices, Dr. Katie will guide us through how small, everyday decisions create the foundation for hormonal and metabolic health. We will dive deep into stress patterns, women's physiology, micro habits that support long-term wellness, and much more.

Leave with practical tools, applicable insights and a renewed sense of support from the inside out.

events.cardDescription: A curated mini retreat with breathwork, grounding, and floral design with Rachael Grace, Thistle & Grace Florals.
events.title: Mini Retreat: Breathe & Bloom
events.description:
Work with your hands and feel more rooted. Create a seasonal floral arrangement under expert guidance and support. Practice presence, shape something living to remember that beauty and joy lie within the process. This experience will reconnect you with your breath, your creativity, and the steady serenity of being.

Come work with your hands, develop creative confidence, and reset for daily life.

**Expect:**
Guided breathwork + gentle grounding
Seasonal floral education and design experience
Time to clear your mind, create, and reconnect

**Leave With:**
Your own handcrafted floral arrangement
A sense of calm centeredness and creative renewal
A connection with yourself and the present moment

Breathe deeply, create freely, and reconnect to the quiet beauty within you.

events.cardDescription: A one-day immersive with Rebekah Jacobs to help you support pregnancy with confidence, care, and clarity. Earn 5 CE units.
events.title: Training: Pregnancy In Practice
events.description:
A Prenatal Yoga Training for Teachers & Expectant Students

This one-day immersive is designed to support you to meet the changing body with clarity, confidence, and care.

Whether you are a yoga teacher or moving through pregnancy yourself, this 3-hour experience offers a grounded, intelligent approach to supporting the prenatal body — to ease discomfort, strengthen the mind & body and prepare for birth.

**You'll learn to:**
- Teach and practice with safety, awareness, and responsiveness
- Adapt movement, flow and shapes skillfully for each trimester
- Use breathing techniques as a foundation for regulation
- Offer grounding tools that cultivate presence and ease
- Understand key anatomy and create truly supportive rest

If you are a Registered Yoga Teacher (RYT), this training is eligible for 5 Yoga Alliance Continuing Education hours.

A refined approach to supporting pregnancy with steadiness, skill, and presence.

events.cardDescription: Deepen your inversion practice with Rebekah Jacobs. Build strength, alignment, and confidence.
events.title: Master Class: Inversions
events.description:
Find lightness. Overcome fears. Develop deep inner confidence: Inversions.

Enjoy the many benefits of inverted poses, whether you are just beginning or moving deeper. Inverted poses help us to reverse the aging process, stimulate the endocrine system, bringing balance & confidence into every aspect of our lives.

Turn your world upside down and let Rebekah guide you with her experienced, nurturing approach and support. Learn how to invert safely through specific intention and alignment. This workshop will include a warm-up to prepare us for some of the most potent inversions including Downward Facing Dog, Headstand, and Handstand. Move at your own pace and flip up your day with a little adventure!

events.cardDescription: A gentle pause created just for you with Caroline Reilly. Restorative yoga, breathwork, and rest.
events.title: Mini Retreat: Moms Replenish
events.description:
Join Caroline Reilly for a gentle pause in the middle of summer — created just for you. Step away from the doing and into a space of rest, breath, and support. This mini retreat is designed to help you soften, reset your nervous system, and reconnect with yourself.

Through restorative yoga, guided breathwork, and quiet moments to simply be, you'll leave feeling grounded, nourished, and renewed.

**Includes:** herbal tea or tonic, small takeaway essential oil roller, soft music + candlelight, optional hands-on assists.

events.cardDescription: Explore advanced backbends and binds with Rebekah Jacobs. Expand your range and deepen your practice.
events.title: Master Class: Advanced Backbends + Binds
events.description:
Join our Founder, Rebekah for this intelligent dive into form and function. Learn to move toward advanced backbends and binds — to remember that even when bound, there is freedom.

This event is designed for students who want to move beyond repetition and into refinement — understand the "why" behind poses to build confidence, strength and clarity, with care. Deepen your understanding of biomechanics, interoception, and sustainable progression. You'll leave with newfound strength, individual feedback and wisdom you can integrate immediately onto your mat.

Expect fun, anatomical insight, hands on support and nervous system aware refinements for bound side angle, wheel, and bird of paradise — designed to develop your courage and resilience.

Come curious. Leave empowered.

events.cardDescription: Build strength and refine your standing postures with Rebekah Jacobs. Precision, power, and presence.
events.title: Master Class: Strength + Standing
events.description:
Join to enhance your strength, tone your glutes and legs and fortify your standing poses including Warrior I, II, III, Triangle, Half Moon Dancer.

This event is designed for students who want to move beyond repetition and into refinement — understand the "why" behind poses to build confidence, strength and clarity, with care.

Deepen your understanding of biomechanics, interoception, and sustainable progression. You'll leave with newfound strength, individual support and wisdom.

Expect fun, anatomical insight and nervous system aware refinements — designed to support your longevity and resilience — in body and mind.

Come curious. Leave empowered.

events.cardDescription: Equip yourself with tools to guide children in building confidence and cultivating kindness with Amy Bilden.
events.title: Training: Kids Yoga
events.description:
Equip yourself with tools to guide children to build confidence and cultivating kindness.

Join the expert educator Amy Bilden for this playful and mindful training, designed to equip teachers, parents and yoga instructors with tools to guide children to build confidence, regulate emotions, cultivate kindness and enhance their focus.

Voted "Best Kids Program," Sama Kids brings yoga to life with joy, mastery and heart.

This training is for educators, parents and the curious student. No prior certification is needed.
